mapper.select: SELECT user_code, user_name, login_id, status FROM users WHERE status = 'a2' ORDER BY user_name
SELECT u.user_code, u.user_name, u.login_id, u.status FROM users u INNER JOIN members m ON u.user_code = m.user_code WHERE u.status = 'a2' AND m.project_id = #{projectId} ORDER BY u.user_name
